property_preferences.suburbs: Inner and middle-ring suburbs on the north side of Seattle, WA — ideally Ballard, Phinney Ridge, Greenwood, or nearby parts of Fremont/Wallingford. Open to Shoreline or Northgate if it means better value and good transit.
property_preferences.property_type: Free-standing single-family home or townhouse (no shared walls on bedroom level strongly preferred). Not interested in high-rise condos; would consider a small 2–3 unit townhouse development with reasonable HOA dues.
property_preferences.preferred_land_size: At least 2,500–4,000 sq ft lot; enough space for a small fenced backyard, a modest garden bed, and a play area for a future dog. Corner lots are fine as long as there’s some privacy and not directly on a major arterial.
property_preferences.other_requirements_line_1: Must be within a 20–30 minute commute to downtown Seattle by bus or light rail (or mixed with biking); walkable to everyday essentials (grocery, coffee shop, pharmacy) within ~10–15 minutes. Off-street parking for at least one car (driveway or dedicated spot) is required; a garage is a strong plus but not a deal-breaker.
property_preferences.other_requirements_line_2: Prefer homes built after 1980 or older homes that have been significantly updated (electrical, plumbing, windows, and roof). Absolutely need in-unit laundry, decent natural light, and a layout that supports a home office space (either a dedicated small room or a nook with enough privacy for video calls). Quiet street or traffic-calmed area, not directly facing a freeway or major commercial strip.
property_preferences.other_requirements_line_3: Would strongly prefer: energy-efficient features (double-pane windows, good insulation, modern furnace/heat pump), a fenced backyard or easy-to-fence yard, and pet-friendly HOA rules if a townhouse. Bonus points for: proximity to parks/green spaces, a small deck or patio for outdoor eating, some storage space for bikes and camping gear, and a finished or finishable basement for future expansion or a guest bedroom.
